data.title: Systems & Service Operations Director – Controls
data.raw_snippet:
**What you will do**


The Systems \& Service Operations Director for Controls is accountable for operational governance and execution excellence across the Controls Order\-to\-Cash lifecycle. This role ensures disciplined Percentage of Completion management, predictable backlog\-to\-invoice conversion, and strong system governance across countries and Controls domains.
